seo.title: CFD Trading Explained: Opportunities, Leverage, and the Risks You Must Manage
seo.description: CFD trading offers flexibility and access to both rising and falling markets, but it comes with increased risk due to leverage. This article outlines essential rules, from risk management to emotional discipline, to help traders build a structured and sustainable approach.
